nasb.text: However the king said, “Let him turn to his own house, and let him not see my face.” So Absalom turned to his own house and did not see the king’s face.

esv.text: And the king said, “Let him dwell apart in his own house; he is not to come into my presence.” So Absalom lived apart in his own house and did not come into the king’s presence.

cnv.text: 王說：“讓他回自己的家裡去，不要見王的面。”押沙龍就轉回自己的家裡去，沒有見王的面。

ccb.text: 王说：“让押沙龙回自己的家，不要让他来见我！”押沙龙便返回自己家中，没有朝见王。
